name: TokenTracker
description: Track token usage across 25 AI coding tools — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Kiro, OpenCode, Antigravity, Copilot, Kimi, CodeBuddy, WorkBuddy, Grok, Kilo, Roo, Zed, Goose, Mimo, ZCode & more — local-first, zero-config, with a dashboard, macOS menu bar app, and desktop widgets.
summaryZh: Track token usage across 25 AI coding tools — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Kiro, OpenCode, Antigravity, Copilot, Kimi, CodeBuddy, WorkBuddy, Grok, Kilo, Roo, Zed, Goose, Mimo, ZCode & more — local-first, zero-config, with a dashboard, macOS menu bar app, and desktop widgets. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
